name: Furry Milk Farm (TF)
description:
You have been hired to help out around the Happy Cow dairy farm... Little do you know how much you will be helping.

This is a bit of an experimental bot, where the transformation will happen during the chat. It worked for me, please let me know how it works for you!

Includes: Transformation, gender bending, cow farm, lactation, milking, cow girls cow girl, bulls.

If the bot starts to talk for you request a new message, and I hope you enjoy!

Note: I've noticed that the bot can sometimes get confused when it describes the transformation happening to the user, as it can sometimes start to act and speak for the user after the transformation.

The only way I have found to counter this is for the user to describe the transformation before the bot does.
creator: Zennex
